quizzes.question: Which Mughal emperor established the Mansabdari system and abolished the Jizya?
Which ruler is historically referred to as the 'wisest fool'?
Who defeated Humayun at the Battle of Kanauj in 1540?
Sir Thomas Roe obtained trade permissions during the reign of which Mughal emperor?
What was the result of the Second Battle of Panipat (1556)?
options: Ahmad Shah Abdali defeated the Marathas

quizzes.question: Which administrative reform is attributed to Lord Cornwallis?
In what year did the Battle of Buxar take place?
Which ruler is famous for implementing market policies and price fixation?
The Pitt's India Act was passed in 1784. Who served as Governor-General of India starting in 1786?
The Battle of Haldighati was fought between which two parties?
options: Ahmad Shah Abdali and the Marathas
